Title: Minimalist Initial 'R' Skyline Hoodie - Astrology Fan Gift
Description:
Celebrate your love for astrology and cool celestial themes with this unique initial 'R' hoodie. The design features a stylized, mysterious skyline incorporated into the letter R, set against a vibrant mint green backdrop.

This comfortable pullover hoodie is perfect for casual outings, festival wear, or simply lounging at home. Its soft feel and breathable material make it an ideal choice for year-round wear.

Key Features:

  • Unique Design: A striking blend of initials and celestial imagery, making it a conversation starter.
  • Comfortable Fit: Relaxed, unisex fit ideal for all body types.
  • High Quality Material: Made from soft, durable fabric that maintains its shape and vibrant print wash after wash.

🎁 Perfect Gift Idea: Makes a thoughtful and stylish gift for friends, family members, or anyone who appreciates cosmic vibes and personalized street wear. Ideal for zodiac fans, astrology enthusiasts, or anyone who loves celestial art.

Care Instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low.
